Communication.title: Americans still feel bad about the economy. When will it get better?
Communication.excerpt: The University of Michigan's consumer sentiment index has recently hit all-time lows. It's one of several consumer opinion surveys showing a structural breakdown in how Americans view the economy.

Communication.title: Will Nvidia Beat Q1 Earnings on May 20? Here's What Prediction Markets Think.
Communication.excerpt: Nvidia is scheduled to report earnings for its first quarter of fiscal 2027 on May 20.

Communication.title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta's news chief, has thoughts
Communication.excerpt: Campbell Brown has spent her career chasing accurate information, first as a renowned TV journalist, then as Facebook's first, and only, dedicated news chief. Now, watching AI reshape how people consume information, she sees history threatening to repeat itself.
